title: Verify navigating to policy detail shows correct policy information

steps.expected: Search runs and matching policy appears in search results

steps.action: Click policy number link in results row
steps.expected: Policy Detail screen loads with correct policy number

steps.action: Verify policy number and status are displayed
steps.expected: Policy number POL-001 and Active status are visible

steps.action: Verify claims table is visible with claim entries
steps.expected: Claims are listed in the claims table
